classObjective: Translate between algebraic expressions and verbal expressions using correct mathematical terminology.
workedExamples: 1-2, Example 1 — Write Verbal Expressions for Algebraic Expressions
1-2, Example 2 — Write Algebraic Expressions for Verbal Expressions
1-2, Example 3 — Write Expressions for Real-World Situations
warmUp: Review operation keywords and symbols from Lesson 1-1
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: coefficient, term, variable recognition; modeling contexts with algebraic expressions
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice translating between algebraic and verbal expressions with attention to mathematical terminology
independentPractice: Practice problems translating between algebraic expressions and verbal expressions
assessment: Exit ticket: translate 2 algebraic expressions to verbal and 1 verbal to algebraic
capReflection: What makes translating algebraic expressions more complex than numerical expressions alone?
